text.title: Fine-tuning OpenAI — Basics (Dataset Preparation) Core Rules

rule.statement: Every line MUST be a JSON object with key 'messages' = list of {role, content} pairs.
rule.rationale: OpenAI fine-tune endpoint rejects any other shape.

rule.statement: Messages MUST alternate user/assistant (with optional leading system); never two same roles in a row.
rule.rationale: Same-role-twice patterns confuse the model and waste examples.

rule.statement: Total training tokens MUST be counted with tiktoken BEFORE submitting the job; cost projected.
rule.rationale: Surprise invoices are common; pre-projection prevents them.

rule.statement: Job MUST have ≥50 examples; synthesise via GPT-4 if below.
rule.rationale: OpenAI documents 50 as the floor; below that the job often regresses against base.

rule.statement: 10% of examples MUST be held out as validation; not used in the training file.
rule.rationale: Without validation, overfit detection is impossible.
